differentials.name: Multifocal urothelial cell cancer Any ureteral filling defect of soft-tissue attenuation must be considered malignant and requires ureteroscopic assessment, biopsy, and cytologic analysis.
differentials.raw: Multifocal urothelial cell cancer Any ureteral filling defect of soft-tissue attenuation must be considered malignant and requires ureteroscopic assessment, biopsy, and cytologic analysis.
